query: Add alt text to this image in the article: ![](images/report-designer-preview.png)
expected_behavior: Views the image file using the image viewing tool before writing alt text
Writes a single descriptive sentence between 10 and 30 words
Does not start with 'Image of', 'Screenshot of', or 'Picture of'
Includes the product or tool name visible in the screenshot
Ends the alt text with a period
Preserves the image path in the markdown reference unchanged

query: Audit the images in designing-reports/overview.md and fix any bad alt text.
expected_behavior: Scans the file for all image references matching the ![...](...)  pattern
Identifies images with empty, filename-only, or too-short alt text
Views each flagged image before writing replacement alt text
Replaces each bad alt text with a descriptive sentence following the rules
Does not modify images that already have acceptable alt text
Reports what was changed and why

query: Fix the alt text on this image: ![report preview ><](images/report-output.png)
expected_behavior: Recognizes the >< suffix as a docs-builder display convention
Preserves the >< suffix at the end of the new alt text
Views the image before writing the replacement alt text
Writes a descriptive sentence ending with a period before the >< suffix
